apps.title: Podcast Plant
apps.why_it_matters: A deep episode set makes repurposing, search, and orchestration obvious inside the app instead of sounding like a claim.
apps.search_intro: Search across many reference episodes to compare topics, clips, and publish surfaces from one shared Bonfyre pipeline.

template.brief: Episode explores {topic} with a focus on {angle}. The Bonfyre path turns the same source into notes, clips, drafts, and a publish-ready bundle.
template.whyItMatters: With many reference episodes, users can feel how Bonfyre clusters topics, reuses artifacts, and branches outputs without changing the core source object.

apps.title: Town in a Box
apps.why_it_matters: A larger civic corpus is what makes search, memory, and long-running public issue tracking feel real.
apps.search_intro: Search across many town records to connect meetings, resident complaints, and public status objects without leaving the app.

template.brief: This {source} covers {issue} in {place}. The reference record highlights where residents need clearer updates, which department owns the response, and how the same civic artifact should stay searchable over time.
template.whyItMatters: When the town demo has depth, users can see retrieval, memory, and issue continuity instead of one isolated summary.

apps.title: Customer Voice
apps.why_it_matters: A broad call set is what makes theme clustering and memory actually persuasive in a customer-voice product.
apps.search_intro: Search across many reference customer calls to spot recurring friction, product pull, and renewal risk patterns.

template.brief: Call captures {theme} during a {stage} with a {segment} customer. The useful demo behavior is seeing that one call becomes part of a broader voice pattern instead of staying isolated.
template.whyItMatters: Customer voice only shines when users can connect many calls into patterns, not just open one summary card.

apps.title: OSS Cockpit
apps.why_it_matters: Maintainer memory becomes convincing when repeated issue clusters are visible across many triage records.
apps.search_intro: Search across many reference maintainer records to see repeated docs, release, and support patterns emerge.

template.brief: Maintainer export clusters {cluster} in the {repo_area} area during {cycle}. The point of the demo is seeing how one triage artifact joins a durable maintainer memory instead of disappearing after review.
template.whyItMatters: A larger maintainer corpus makes semantic memory and digest handoff feel like real leverage, not a feature bullet.

apps.title: Memory Atlas
apps.why_it_matters: This app only feels special when users can move through a larger web of related memories.
apps.search_intro: Search across many reference memories to see recurring places, people, and events connect into an atlas.

template.brief: This memory links {person}, the {place}, and {event} from {era}. The interesting part of the demo is how one memory becomes easier to retrieve once many related moments exist together.
template.whyItMatters: The atlas starts to feel real when a search can surface connected memories instead of returning a single note.
